az-400.title: AZ-400 Designing and Implementing Microsoft DevOps Solutions Practice Exam

topics.name: Configure processes and communications
modules: Configure activity traceability and flow of work

topics.name: Design and implement source control
modules: Design and implement a source control strategy
Plan and implement branching strategies for the source code

topics.name: Design and implement build and release pipelines
modules: Configure pipelines to use variables and parameters

topics.name: Develop a security and compliance plan
modules: Design and implement authentication and authorization methods
Design a strategy for managing sensitive information in automation

topics.name: Implement an instrumentation strategy
modules: Configure monitoring for a DevOps environment
Analyze metrics from application, infrastructure, and network
Analyze logs from application, infrastructure, and network

questions.question: You want pipeline-as-code with PR validation for app-engineering-1000. What should you use?
questions.explanation: YAML pipelines enable pipeline-as-code, branch policies, and PR validation.

reasoning.correct: Integrated with version control and supports multi-stage CI/CD.

why_others_wrong.1: UI-based and not defined as code.

questions.question: Which strategies minimize risk during production rollouts? (Select two)
questions.explanation: Blue/green and canary allow progressive exposure and quick rollback.

reasoning.correct: They reduce blast radius and support validation before full cutover.

questions.question: Which approach improves readability and modularity for Azure resource templates?
questions.explanation: Bicep is a higher-level language than ARM JSON with modules for reuse.

reasoning.correct: Declarative, typed authoring with tooling improves maintainability.

questions.question: You must block secrets in PRs to main. What should you implement?
options: Branch policies with required build and secret scanning
questions.explanation: Branch policies with a validation pipeline and secret scanning prevent merging leaking secrets.

reasoning.correct: Automated gate in PRs enforces compliance.

why_others_wrong.1: Used for deployments; unrelated to scanning.
why_others_wrong.3: Apply post-build; does not prevent secret merge.
